name: Caramel Latte
description: Smooth espresso with rich caramel and creamy steamed milk.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Toasted sourdough with smashed avocado and feta.

name: Classic Cappuccino
description: Bold espresso topped with a perfect balance of steamed milk and foam.

name: Blueberry Muffin
description: Fluffy and moist muffin bursting with fresh blueberries.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: Golden grilled bread with gooey melted cheddar inside.

name: Mocha Frappe
description: Chilled mocha blended with ice and topped with whipped cream.

name: Almond Croissant
description: Buttery, flaky croissant filled with sweet almond paste.

name: Matcha Latte
description: Earthy Japanese matcha blended with steamed milk for a calming boost.

name: Pumpkin Spice Roll
description: Spiced pumpkin cake rolled with sweet cream cheese filling.

name: Iced Hibiscus Tea
description: Floral and fruity herbal tea served over ice — refreshing and caffeine-free.
